treatment_information.specific_treatment: Coronary artery bypass graft x5 with left internal mammary artery to left anterior descending artery, and saphenous vein grafts
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Endoscopic harvesting of the long saphenous vein
treatment_information.treatment_response: Sternal incision healing well, no erythema or drainage. Significant ecchymosis thigh edema trace.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented to the emergency room with chest and jaw pain.
Cardiac catheterization revealed multi vessel coronary artery disease.
Coronary artery bypass graft surgery performed.
Sternal incision and left endoscopic harvesting of the saphenous vein healing well post-surgery.

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented x3, ambulating, gait steady.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointment with surgeon necessary to discuss driving and further recovery.
patient_outcome.complications: No complications during or immediately after treatment mentioned.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient instructed on care for incisions and the importance of monitoring weight and temperature.
